title: Aeroxon Butterfly Motif Fly Trap, Pack of 4, Decorative Adhesive Trap, Indoor Fly Trap, Catcher for Windows
features: Decorative design: butterfly fly trap for windows with attractive orange monarch butterfly design
Effective duration: long-lasting effectiveness for up to 6 months of continuous fly protection
Application: easy to apply adhesive trap, ideal for mounting on the window to catch annoying flies
Safety: non-toxic and odourless glue trap for safe use in the home
Box contents: set of 4 decorative fly traps with butterfly motif for multiple windows
The odorless butterfly shaped fly trap from Aeroxon is the perfect way to rid your home of annoying flies
description: The Aeroxon motif fly trap with butterfly design is a decorative and effective solution to annoying fly problems. This non-toxic adhesive trap is ideal for attaching to the window and provides a long-lasting effect of up to 6 months. The set contains 4 traps with an attractive butterfly motif in bright orange and yellow tones that blend harmoniously into your home. The odourless adhesive trap reliably catches flies and is particularly practical for use in living rooms, kitchens or other areas where conventional insect repellents are undesirable. The handling is very simple - simply attach the trap to the desired location and use its effectiveness for several months. A proven Aeroxon product that has been successfully used since 1911 against fly infestation.
